scripts.dev:web: pnpm -r --filter "./packages/*" run build && pnpm -r --filter "web" run start:dev
scripts.dev:server: pnpm -r --filter "./packages/*" run build && pnpm --filter "server" run start:dev
scripts.dev:all: pnpm -r --filter "./packages/*" run build && pnpm -r --parallel --if-present --filter "./packages/*" --filter "./apps/*" run start:dev
